channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: 5 dead, others injured in a shooting at a private Christian school in Wisconsin
item.description: MADISON, Wis. (AP) — Five people are dead and others injured after a shooting Monday at a private Christian school in Wisconsin, including a child who caused the attack, authorities said. Madison Police Chief Shon Barnes was speaking to reporters when the death toll rose to five from three people.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Chief adviser to NYC Mayor Eric Adams resigns and expects to be indicted
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Ingrid Lewis-Martin, a former top aide to New York Mayor Eric Adams, expects to be indicted on criminal charges related to alleged improper gifts, her lawyer said Monday.
item.dc:creator: ANTHONY IZAGUIRRE and JAKE OFFENHARTZ, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Russian presence in Syria remains. But it's unclear for how long
item.description: HMEIMIM, Syria (AP) — A convoy of Russian military vehicles rolled down the highway towards the Syrian city of Tartus on Monday as soldiers stood guard. Planes periodically descended and rose from Russia’s Hmeimim air base in the Syrian coastal province of Latakia while smoke rose from the base.
item.dc:creator: ABBY SEWELL, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Germany's Scholz loses a confidence vote, setting up an early election in February
item.description: BERLIN (AP) — Chancellor Olaf Scholz lost a confidence vote in the German parliament on Monday, putting the European Union’s most populous member and biggest economy on course to hold an early election in February.
item.dc:creator: GEIR MOULSON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: How old are Saturn's rings? Study suggests they could be 4.5 billion years old just like the planet
item.description: New research suggests that Saturn's rings may be older than they look — possibly as old as the planet. Instead of being a youthful 400 million years old as commonly thought, the icy, shimmering rings could be 4.5 billion years old just like Saturn.
item.dc:creator: MARCIA DUNN AP Aerospace Writer, WFLA, NBC

item.title: 5 dead, including suspect, in Wisconsin school shooting
item.description: At least five people are dead and another five were injured after a shooting at the Abundant Life Christian School in Madison.
item.dc:creator: Devin Willems, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: 5 dead, others injured in a shooting at a private Christian school in Wisconsin
item.description: Authorities say five people are dead and others injured after a shooting Monday at a private Christian school in Wisconsin, including a child who caused the attack.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Trump, Softbank CEO announce $100B SoftBank investment in the US
item.description: resident-elect Donald Trump will join SoftBank Group CEO Masayoshi Son at his Florida home on Monday to announce that the Japanese company is planning to invest $100 billion in U.S. projects over the next four years.
item.dc:creator: Colleen Long, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Missouri's death row had nearly 100 inmates in the 1990s. Now, it has eight
item.description: ST. LOUIS (AP) — Missouri 's status as one of the most active death penalty states is about to change for one simple reason: The state is running out of inmates to execute. The lethal injection of Christopher Collings on Dec.
item.dc:creator: JIM SALTER, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Drone sightings lead to airspace shutdown at Ohio military base, arrests near Boston airport
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — More suspected drone sightings in the eastern U.S. led to a temporary airspace shutdown at an Air Force base in Ohio and arrests near Boston's Logan International Airport, as elected officials increased their push for action to identify and stop the mysterious unmanned flights.
item.dc:creator: DAVE COLLINS and BIANCA VÁZQUEZ TONESS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jill Jacobson, actress who appeared on 'Star Trek' and 'Falcon Crest,' dies at 70
item.description: "We are incredibly sad to say goodbye to our beautiful, soulful, hysterically funny, elegantly raunchy client, Jill Jacobson," her manager Ben Padua told Nexstar.
item.dc:creator: Christine Samra, Fox 5

item.title: LeBron James returns to score 18 in Lakers' win vs Grizzlies after missing 2 games with foot injury
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — LeBron James returned to the Los Angeles Lakers on Sunday night in a 116-110 victory over the Memphis Grizzlies after a two-game break. James is fighting a left foot injury and was away from the team most of last week because of personal reasons.
item.dc:creator: KYLE GLASER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Mysterious drones leave officials perplexed
item.description: With drone sightings spreading through the East Coast, federal officials are helping local and state authorities.
item.dc:creator: Basil John, WGN 9

item.title: As schools cut back on bus service, parents turn to rideshare apps
item.description: Reliance on school buses has been waning for years as districts struggle to find drivers and more students attend schools far outside their neighborhoods.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: White House staying quiet on mysterious drones terrorizing Americans and more top headlines
item.description: Get all the stories you need-to-know from the most powerful name in news delivered first thing every morning to your inbox.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 2 Massachusetts men arrested for flying drone 'dangerously close' to Boston airport
item.description: Boston Police say two men who flew a drone "dangerously close" to Logan International Airport tried to flee on foot before their arrest over the weekend.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Speaker Johnson faces 'complicated' decision on crucial Rules Committee chair
item.description: Speaker Mike Johnson (R-La.) is barreling into a tricky — yet critical — decision over whom to appoint as the next chair of the House Rules Committee, a post that will set the tone for legislating and play a key role in keeping Republicans united in next year’s ultrathin majority.
item.dc:creator: Emily Brooks, Fox 5

item.title: 2 teens killed, 4 injured in shooting at makeshift club in Houston
item.description: HOUSTON (AP) — Two teens were killed and four were injured — including a 13-year-old girl — in a shooting at a makeshift club in Houston, police said Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Biden establishes a national monument for Frances Perkins, the 1st female Cabinet secretary
item.description: President Joe Biden has signed a proclamation establishing a national monument honoring the late FDR-era Labor Secretary Frances Perkins.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Point guard Dennis Schroder traded by Brooklyn to Golden State
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — By adding Dennis Schroder, the Golden State Warriors believe they have found the perfect backcourt mate to complement Stephen Curry. Curry can't wait to get going in what he expects to be a “seamless transition for him.” “It can help me, it can help us,” Curry said.
item.dc:creator: JANIE McCAULEY, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: San Diego man dies after being mauled by his own dogs: police
item.description: A man was mauled by his three dogs at a neighborhood park Thursday afternoon, according to the San Diego Police Department.
item.dc:creator: Tony Shin, KRON4

item.title: Cartel-run clandestine fentanyl labs increasingly difficult to track
item.description: Mexican drug cartels are driving an opioid epidemic, flooding the United States with increasingly potent synthetic drugs.
item.dc:creator: Jorge Ventura, NewsNation

item.title: More than 120 House Democrats send letter to Biden urging him to ratify Equal Rights Amendment
item.description: “We must continue our efforts to fully affirm and recognize the equality of rights for all people, regardless of sex, as part of our Constitution, a vital effort that has never been more urgent,” Congress members penned.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, NewsNation

item.title: US agencies should use advanced technology to identify mysterious drones, Schumer says
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — After weeks of fear and bewilderment about the drones buzzing over parts of New York and New Jersey, elected officials are urging action to identify and stop the mysterious flights. “There’s a lot of us who are pretty frustrated right now,” Rep. Jim Himes, D-Conn.
item.dc:creator: BIANCA VÁZQUEZ TONESS and DAVE COLLINS, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Law enforcement, Humane Society rescue hundreds of animals in alleged cruelty case
item.description: Pigs on the property had no sign of access to food or water, while the goats had a frozen water trough.
item.dc:creator: Mario Gonzalez/KFOR, NewsNation

item.title: California man dies after being mauled by his own dogs: police
item.description: A man was mauled by his three dogs at a neighborhood park Thursday afternoon, according to the San Diego Police Department.
item.dc:creator: Tony Shin, KTLA 5

item.title: What we know about drones over New Jersey, other parts of the US
item.description: The drones have prompted concern from local residents, anger from lawmakers and endless speculation on social media.
item.dc:creator: Sean Noone, Fox 5

item.title: FedEx worker accused of stealing $12K in jewelry from package
item.description: A former FedEx employee is accused of stealing more than $12,000 in jewelry from a package she was handling at the Memphis hub.
item.dc:creator: Melissa Moon, NewsNation

item.title: Texas company says baby poop and fungi could be the solution to plastic waste
item.description: A dirty diaper may be gross to you, but one Texas company believes it could be the secret ingredient to helping answer an environmental question: How do we clean up all of our plastic waste?
item.dc:creator: Eric Henrikson, KRON4

item.title: California warehouse fire sends toxic smoke into the air
item.description: A large fire at a commercial building in the city of Commerce sent toxic smoke into the air late Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Will Conybeare, NewsNation

item.title: Holiday shopping scams to avoid this winter
item.description: Waiting on a plethora of present-related notifications? Don't assume all emails and texts you get are legitimate.
item.dc:creator: Anna Kutz, Fox 5
